name: my-aproject
description: Minimal autonomous AI agent marketplace framework for the Synthesis hackathon

scripts.dev: npx concurrently --kill-others "npm run backend:dev" "npm run frontend:dev"
scripts.submit: node --env-file=.env --experimental-strip-types src/api/server.ts submit "build a landing page"
scripts.start: npx concurrently --kill-others "npm run backend:dev" "npm run frontend:dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run frontend:install && npm run hardhat:install
